title: Location
description: A physical location (e.g., store, restaurant, locker, warehouse).

transition.description: Location ids MAY be specified by platforms in requests.
Location names should not be specified by platforms.

geo.description: Geographic coordinates and geofence for the location.

hours.description: Regular weekly operating hours. For overnight hours, use two entries across two days.

exception_hours.description: Exception hours for specific dates (holidays, closures, etc.).

timezone.description: IANA timezone identifier (e.g., 'America/New_York'). MUST be set when hours or exception_hours are present Required for correct interpretation.
